common.dragDrop: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse

errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {{size}}MB.
errors.quotaExceeded: Monthly usage limit reached. Please try again next month.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.noFileSelected: No file selected. Please choose a file to upload.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.success: Password updated successfully! Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.error: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.noToken: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.

home.hero: Everything You Need to Work with PDF Files — Instantly
home.heroSub: Upload or drag & drop your file, and we'll auto-detect its type and suggest the right tools — edit, convert, compress, and more. No registration required.
home.uploadCta: Drag your file here or click to browse
home.uploadOr: Supported: PDF, Word, JPG, PNG, WebP, MP4 — Max size: 50 MB.
home.uploadSubtitle: We generate a quick preview and instantly show matching tools.
home.editNowTooltip: Open quick PDF optimization for a cleaner downloadable copy
home.suggestedToolsDesc: After uploading, we automatically show compatible tools: text editing, highlighting, merge/split, compress, convert to Word/image, video to GIF, and more.
home.unsupportedFile: This file type is not supported. Try PDF, Word, images, or video.
home.featuresTitle: A smarter way to convert and edit online
home.feature1Desc: Edit, convert, compress, merge, split without switching tabs.
home.feature2Desc: Get pixel-perfect, editable files in seconds with zero quality loss.
home.feature3Desc: Access files securely, protected by automatic encryption.

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents online for free.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF
wordToPdf.description: Convert Word documents (DOC, DOCX) to PDF format online for free.

compressPdf.title: Compress PDF
compressPdf.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Choose your compression level.

imageConvert.title: Image Converter
imageConvert.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats instantly.

imageResize.title: Image Resize
imageResize.description: Resize images to exact dimensions while maintaining quality.
imageResize.aspectHint: Enter one dimension — the other will auto-calculate to preserve aspect ratio.

ocr.title: OCR — Text Recognition
ocr.description: Extract text from images and scanned PDF documents using optical character recognition.

removeBg.title: Remove Background
removeBg.description: Remove the background from images automatically using AI. Get a transparent PNG in seconds.

videoToGif.title: Video to GIF
videoToGif.description: Create animated GIFs from video clips. Customize start time, duration, and quality.

wordCounter.title: Word Counter
wordCounter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text instantly.
wordCounter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...

textCleaner.title: Text Cleaner
textCleaner.description: Remove extra spaces, convert text case, and clean up your text instantly.

mergePdf.title: Merge PDF
mergePdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Free and fast.
mergePdf.minFiles: Please select at least 2 PDF files to merge.

splitPdf.title: Split PDF
splitPdf.description: Split a PDF into individual pages or extract specific page ranges.
splitPdf.allPagesDesc: Extract every page as a separate PDF file
splitPdf.selectPagesDesc: Extract only specific pages or ranges

errors.requiredPages: Please enter page numbers or ranges (e.g. 1,3,5-8).
errors.outOfRange: Selected pages ({{selected}}) are out of range. This PDF has only {{total}} page(s).
errors.invalidFormat: Invalid page format: {{tokens}}. Use a format like 1,3,5-8.
errors.noPagesSelected: No pages selected. This PDF has {{total}} page(s).

rotatePdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotatePdf.description: Rotate all pages of a PDF by 90°, 180°, or 270° degrees.

pdfToImages.title: PDF to Images
pdfToImages.description: Convert each page of a PDF into high-quality images (PNG or JPG).

imagesToPdf.title: Images to PDF
imagesToPdf.description: Combine multiple images into a single PDF document.
imagesToPdf.invalidFiles: Please select valid image files (JPG, PNG, WebP).
imagesToPdf.minFiles: Please select at least one image.

watermarkPdf.title: Watermark PDF
watermarkPdf.description: Add a custom text watermark to every page of your PDF.

protectPdf.title: Protect PDF
protectPdf.description: Add password protection to your PDF to prevent unauthorized access.

unlockPdf.title: Unlock PDF
unlockPdf.description: Remove password protection from your PDF file.

pageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers
pageNumbers.description: Add page numbers to every page of your PDF. Choose position and starting number.

pdfEditor.title: Quick PDF Optimizer
pdfEditor.description: Create a cleaner, optimized copy of your PDF with one click while keeping the original untouched.
pdfEditor.intro: Upload your PDF and generate an optimized copy ready for sharing and download.

steps.step2: Click optimize to create a fresh processed copy.
steps.step3: Download or share the generated file link.

pdfEditor.saveTooltip: Create an optimized copy of the file
pdfEditor.versionNote: This tool currently focuses on PDF optimization and clean output generation. The original file is never modified.
pdfEditor.privacyNote: Your files are protected — we perform security checks before processing and use encrypted connections (HTTPS). See our Privacy Policy for more details.
pdfEditor.preparingPreviewSub: This may take a few seconds depending on file size.
pdfEditor.applyingChangesSub: Don't close the window — a new file will be created when done.
pdfEditor.savedSuccess: Changes saved successfully — you can now download the file.
pdfEditor.processingFailed: Failed to process the file. Try re-uploading or try again later.
pdfEditor.fileTooLarge: File size exceeds the limit (20MB). Please reduce the file size and try again.

pdfFlowchart.title: PDF to Flowchart
pdfFlowchart.description: Extract procedures from PDF documents and convert them into interactive flowcharts automatically.
pdfFlowchart.uploadDesc: Upload your PDF document to extract procedures
pdfFlowchart.dragDropHint: or drag and drop your PDF file here
pdfFlowchart.trySampleDesc: Try our sample document to see the tool in action
pdfFlowchart.extractingDesc: We are scanning your PDF and identifying procedures
pdfFlowchart.noProcedures: No procedures were detected in this document. Try a different PDF.
pdfFlowchart.selectProceduresDesc: Choose which procedures to convert into flowcharts
pdfFlowchart.generatingDesc: Creating visual flowcharts from selected procedures
pdfFlowchart.flowReadyDesc: Your flowcharts have been generated successfully
pdfFlowchart.manualDesc: Specify a page range and create a custom procedure
pdfFlowchart.noPageContent: No content available for this page
pdfFlowchart.chatWelcome: Hi! I can help you improve the flowchart "{{title}}". Ask me anything about the flow structure, suggest improvements, or request simplifications.
pdfFlowchart.chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pdfFlowchart.chatSuggestion1: How can I simplify this flow?

compressImage.title: Compress Image
compressImage.description: Reduce image file size while maintaining quality. Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP.

pdfToExcel.title: PDF to Excel
pdfToExcel.description: Extract tables from PDF files and convert them to Excel spreadsheets.

errors.noTables: No tables found in this PDF. Please use a PDF that contains tabular data.
errors.processingFailed: Failed to convert to Excel. Please try a different PDF.
errors.invalidFile: Invalid or corrupted PDF file. Please upload a valid PDF.

removeWatermark.title: Remove Watermark
removeWatermark.description: Remove text watermarks from PDF files automatically.

reorderPdf.title: Reorder PDF Pages
reorderPdf.description: Rearrange the pages of your PDF in any order you want.
reorderPdf.orderHint: Enter page numbers separated by commas in the desired order.

extractPages.title: Extract PDF Pages
extractPages.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF into a new document.
extractPages.pagesHint: Enter page numbers or ranges separated by commas.

qrCode.title: QR Code Generator
qrCode.description: Generate QR codes from text, URLs, or any data. Customize size and download as PNG.
qrCode.dataPlaceholder: Enter text, URL, or any data...

htmlToPdf.title: HTML to PDF
htmlToPdf.description: Convert HTML files to PDF documents with full styling support.

chatPdf.title: Chat with PDF
chatPdf.description: Ask questions about your PDF document and get AI-powered answers.
chatPdf.questionPlaceholder: What would you like to know about this document?

summarizePdf.title: Summarize PDF
summarizePdf.description: Get an AI-generated summary of your PDF document in seconds.

translatePdf.title: Translate PDF
translatePdf.description: Translate your PDF document content to any language using AI.

tableExtractor.title: Extract Tables from PDF
tableExtractor.description: Detect and extract tables from PDF documents into structured data.
tableExtractor.noTables: No tables were found in this document.

errors.noTables: No tables found in this PDF. This tool works best with PDFs containing tabular data.
errors.processingFailed: Failed to extract tables. Please try a different PDF.
errors.invalidFile: Invalid or corrupted PDF file. Please upload a valid PDF.

account.heroTitle: Save your file activity in one secure workspace
account.heroSubtitle: Create a free account to keep recent downloads, return to finished tasks, and build a usable history for your document workflow.
account.benefit1: Keep recent generated files in one timeline instead of losing links after each session.
account.benefit2: See which tool produced each result so repeated work is faster and less error-prone.
account.benefit3: Prepare your workspace for future premium limits, batch tools, and saved settings.
account.loadFailed: We couldn't load your account data. Please try again.
account.formSubtitle: Use the same account across sessions to keep your generated file history available.
account.upgradeNotice: Contact us to upgrade to Pro for higher limits, no ads, and B2B API access.
account.apiKeysSubtitle: Manage your B2B API keys. Each key gives Pro-level async access to all tools.
account.apiKeyCopyWarning: Copy this key now — it will never be shown again.
account.apiKeysEmpty: No API keys yet. Create one above.
account.historySubtitle: Completed and failed tasks tied to your account appear here automatically.
account.historyEmpty: No file history yet. Process a file while signed in and it will appear here.

result.downloadReady: Your file is ready for download.
